narrative:
Auglaize County has 31,808 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.7% of registrants.
